title: 1991–92 Divizia C

Starting with the following season season, the third division reduced the number of clubs to 80. The **1991–92 Divizia C** was the 36th season of [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"), the third tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system"). Starting with the following season season, the third division reduced the number of clubs to 80. As 18 clubs were relegated from the second division, only the top four teams from each series remained in the third division, while the others were relegated to the county championships.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
